name: Worley Limited
description: Worley Limited is a global professional services company that provides consulting, engineering, and project delivery expertise to the energy, chemicals, resources, and complex process industries. Headquartered in Australia, the company supports customers across the full project lifecycle, from early-stage studies and consulting to construction, operations, and maintenance. With a focus on sustainability and digital transformation, Worley helps its clients navigate the energy transition by delivering innovative solutions for conventional energy, low-carbon energy, and critical infrastructure projects worldwide.
